1.title: AllowedRequests Sum (by Region and Rule)
1.query:
timeseries allowed_requests_sum_by_region_rule = avg(cloud.aws.wafv2.allowed_requests_sum_by_region_rule),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(allowed_requests_sum_by_region_rule) desc
| limit 20
